communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Washington Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Records of 911 emergency calls to the Northwest ICE Processing Center on Monday, March 2. Responsive records should include, but not be limited to, audio recordings of all emergency calls, CAD incident notes, call taker notes, dispatch logs, and response priority classifications.

I am a member of the media, and the documents will be used in the course of reporting. The request is not being made for commercial purposes. If there are fees that you determine cannot be waived for members of the media, please inform me of the total charges in advance. I would prefer the request be filled electronically, via e-mail attachment if available, or on a CD-ROM if not.

Thanks in advance. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Marianne Dhenin

title: Mar 2, 2026, 911 Call NWIPC (Pierce County Sheriff's Department)
